center.name: 梅尔维尔岛 (澳大利亚)
center.summary: 梅尔维尔岛 (澳大利亚)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Chestnut-backed buttonquail、Red-headed myzomela，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also native to Melville Island and Groote Eylandt

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|A juvenile The nominate subspecies of the red-headed myzomela is distributed across the tropical coastlines of Western Australia, the Northern Territory and Queensland. It inhabits coastal areas of the Kimberley and various offshore islands in Western Australia, and is similarly distributed in the Northern Territory, including Melville Island and the Sir Edward Pellew Group of Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also native to Melville Island and Groote Eylandt
